title: 第2節　橋脚の陰
continuityNotes: This is the Sera-side second section of the same bridge incident as scene-001-002-001-sato.
Keep the same bridge, same stair landing, and same blossom-caught morning wind as the paired image.
Sato must remain an unaware background runner further along the bridge and must face his route rather than the incident.
prompt: Create one vertical smartphone-friendly scene illustration for a serial web novel. Do not render any readable text, chapter numbers, talk labels, section labels, captions, subtitles, logos, or UI overlays inside the image. Story context: 第1章　朝の河畔 / 第2話　川風に乗る. Scene focus: 第2節　橋脚の陰 / セラパート. Summary: 橋の踊り場では、清掃作業員を装った男が滑り止めシートの端へ透明な被膜剤を塗っていた。もう一人は自転車乗りを装い、ふらついた標的を階段側へ寄せる役。下の橋脚脇には、落ちた人間をす… Key beats: 橋の踊り場では、清掃作業員を装った男が滑り止めシートの端へ透明な被膜剤を塗っていた。もう一人は自転車乗りを装い、ふらついた標的を階段側へ寄せる役。下の橋脚脇には、落ちた人間をすぐ抱え込める位置に拘束班がいる。橋は風があるぶん、ほんの一歩の乱れがよく効く。だから選んだのだろうが、選び方としてはあまりに露骨だった。 セラは欄干の影へ体を沿わせたまま、朝光で不自然に照る被膜の筋を見た。メイド風ジョギングウェアは見た目こそ柔らかいが、走るための裁断はよくできている。裾も袖も動きを邪魔しない。彼女は踊り場へ続く人波の死角へ入り、距離だけを詰めた。 「春風のせいにしたいなら、もう少し丁寧にやってください」 まず被膜剤のノズルへ踵を入れ、中身を床へ落とさず手元だけを狂わせる。振り返った男の手首へ白手袋が絡み、そのまま欄干支柱へ押しつけられた。自転車役がタイミングを合わせて車体を振った瞬間には、セラの膝が前輪の芯を外し、男ごと手すり側へ流す。階段下から出てきた拘束役には、踊り場の死角で肘を一撃。息を失った三人は、清掃用具と車体の陰に静かに折りたたまれた。 Use the supplied character reference images to preserve these canonical looks: sato-jogging: サトー. Keep him as a mature 45-year-old Japanese man with long hair tied in a ponytail, mustache and chin beard, and a lean athletic build. In this novel he must always wear cool-weather jogging clothes, never denim or businesswear. sera-jogging: セラ. Keep her in a maid-inspired running outfit rather than an indoor maid dress, with silver-gray hair, golden eyes, black-and-white technical fabrics, and a clearly visible cat-ear headband support-security unit. Do not turn the outfit into armor or a generic tracksuit. Focus characters: sera-jogging. Keep them clearly readable in the foreground or midground. Continuity notes: This is the Sera-side second section of the same bridge incident as scene-001-002-001-sato. Keep the same bridge, same stair landing, and same blossom-caught morning wind as the paired image. Sato must remain an unaware background runner further along the bridge and must face his route rather than the incident. In every scene of this novel, Sato must keep his canonical face, long ponytail, mustache, chin beard, and lean 45-year-old build, while wearing early-April jogging wear suited to a cool Tokyo morning: a light running jacket or windbreaker, technical long-sleeve top, tapered running pants, and running shoes. In every scene of this novel, Sera must keep her canonical face, silver-gray hair, golden eyes, and cat ears while wearing a maid-inspired jogging outfit built from black-and-white performance fabrics, with apron-line design cues, a short pleated running skirt over leggings, a light jacket, running shoes, and a visible cat-ear headband support-security unit. For Sato-part images, Sato must be the dominant subject and Sera, if visible, must stay clearly separated from him by distance, never adjacent, never shoulder-to-shoulder, and never readable as a companion; she may be visible in the distance or on another part of the path, but not as an extremely tiny speck. For Sera-part images, Sera must be the dominant subject, actively stopping a separate attacker who clearly does not resemble Sato. In every Sera-part image, Sato must remain an unaware background figure, non-combatant, not helping, facing away from the action or looking elsewhere, and not looking toward Sera, the attacker, or the incident. Never let any attacker resemble Sato in face, hair, beard, age, clothing, build, or silhouette. All human figures must have normal anatomy with exactly two arms and two hands.  Create a tense bridge-landing action image with Sera dominant, stopping a slip-and-grab ambush involving a fake cyclist, a saboteur near anti-slip flooring, or abductors waiting by bridge stairs. Keep Sato smaller in the background, simply running onward and unaware.
